## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally with no new failures.
- [ ] `ruff check . && ruff format --check .` passes.
- [ ] Coverage has not regressed below the enforced floor.
- [ ] New public functions and modules have docstrings and type annotations.
- [ ] User-visible changes have an entry in `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`.
- [ ] No hostnames, tokens, personal data, or operator-specific configuration in the diff.
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes have been reviewed against OWASP Top 10 and `SECURITY.md`.
